hero.subtitle: Experience the thrill of motorsport legends inside an interactive digital space.
hero.ctaLearnLabel: Learn more about the Motorsports Museum

exhibits.title: Featured Exhibits
exhibits.subtitle: Explore our carefully curated collection of motorsport history's most iconic moments and machines.

f1.title: Formula 1 Heritage
f1.description: Witness the evolution of speed with iconic F1 machines, from legendary championship-winning cars to cutting-edge hybrid technology that defines modern racing.

lemans.title: Le Mans Endurance
lemans.description: Experience the ultimate test of stamina and engineering, featuring legendary endurance racers that conquered the 24-hour battle at Circuit de la Sarthe.

rally.title: Rally Legends
rally.description: Feel the raw power of off-road racing with championship-winning rally cars that dominated grueling stages across mountains, forests, and desert terrain.

explore.description: Walk the halls of motorsport history. Explore iconic machines up close, listen to their stories, and experience racing heritage like never before.
explore.imageAlt: Panoramic view of the Motorsports Museum interior

about.subtitle: Pick a tour style, move through the space, and open focused details for each car.

modes.title: Two Ways to Experience It
modes.description: Choose between two modes when you enter the museum. Each one offers a different way to move through the collection.

movement.title: Move Through the Hall
movement.description: Use WASD to walk, Shift to run, Space to jump, and R to reset your position if needed.

interaction.title: Read the History
interaction.description: An eye indicator appears when you face a car. Click it to open the full information panel.

viewer.title: Inspect 3D Models
viewer.description: Open the detailed model view to rotate, pan, and zoom around selected cars.

details.title: Read Exhibit Details
details.description: Review each car's history, technical specs, media gallery, and quick facts in one place.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up to start your motorsport journey
auth.confirmationSent: We've sent you a confirmation link to complete your registration.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

modeSelection.title: Motorsports Museum
modeSelection.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to experience the collection
modeSelection.freeRoamDesc: Explore the museum at your own pace. Walk through exhibits and interact with cars freely.
modeSelection.narratedTourDesc: A curated journey through 8 legendary cars with narration and interesting facts.

welcome.title: Welcome to the museum
welcome.body: Step inside a collection of legendary racing machines. Walk the halls at your own pace, get up close to each car, and uncover the stories and engineering behind motorsport history.

movement.title: Move and look around
movement.body: Use your keyboard to move and your mouse to look. The museum spans three floors, one for each motorsport discipline.

interact.title: Inspect a car
interact.body: Walk up to any car. When you're close enough, the crosshair turns into an eye icon — that means you can interact with it.
interact.panelNote: The information panel opens with the car's history and a detailed 3D view you can rotate and zoom.

pause.title: Pause anytime
pause.body: Press either key to open the pause menu.
pause.optionsTitle: From the pause menu you can:

ready.title: You're ready to explore
ready.body: That's everything you need. Close this to start walking — you can reopen the controls anytime from the pause menu.

movement.title: Movement
movement.subtitle: Explore the museum freely using your keyboard.

camera.title: Camera
camera.subtitle: Control your view to admire every detail.
camera.freeLookDesc: Move the mouse to look around. The cursor will remain hidden during the tour.

interaction.title: Interaction
interaction.subtitle: Discover the history behind each vehicle.
interaction.interestIndicatorDesc: When you look at a car, an eye icon appears. Left click to open its information panel — with the car's history and a detailed 3D view.

detailedView.title: Detailed View
detailedView.subtitle: Examine 3D models with total freedom.
detailedView.cursorNote: In this mode the cursor is not locked. You can interact freely with the model.

hud.tourCompleteMessage: Thank you for experiencing the Motorsports Museum collection.
hud.exitConfirmMessage: Your progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?

loading.title: Motorsports Museum
loading.stuckHint: If loading seems stuck, try reloading the page.

freeRoamHud.pauseHintA11y: Press Escape to open the pause menu

a11y.freeRoamMouseNote: Requires mouse and pointer lock. For keyboard navigation, use the Narrated Tour.
a11y.jumpToStopMenu: Jump to tour stop, currently stop {current} of {total}
a11y.carListMenu: Open car list, currently stop {current} of {total}
a11y.textOnlyMode: Text only. Narration shown as text.
